task_groups.title: Write structural and file-level validation tests

subtasks.title: Write test: api/openapi.yaml exists and parses as valid OpenAPI 3.1
details: Create api/api_test.go with a Go test function TestOpenAPISpec.
Use os.ReadFile to read api/openapi.yaml; call t.Fatalf on read error (not panic/os.Exit).
Call libopenapi.NewDocument(bytes); call t.Fatalf if err != nil.
Call doc.BuildV3Model(); call t.Fatalf if len(errs) > 0 with error details.
Assert model is non-nil and Info is present. Do NOT assert on individual operations, ETags, or examples.
Add go.mod entry for github.com/pb33f/libopenapi.

subtasks.title: Write test: top-level servers block and health probe path-level overrides
details: In api/api_test.go, add TestOpenAPIServers.
Parse spec; assert top-level Servers has exactly one entry with URL '/api/v1' and description 'Default mount point (configurable per deployment)'.
Assert path items for /healthz, /readyz, /version each have Servers[0].URL == '/'.
These checks are structural (path item existence), not semantic operation checks.

subtasks.title: Write test: all $ref targets resolve and openapi-validator exits 0
details: Add TestOpenAPIRefResolution in api/api_test.go that calls BuildV3Model and asserts zero errors (covers unresolved refs).
Create or update Makefile with a 'check' target that runs: go run github.com/pb33f/libopenapi-validator/cmd/openapi-validator@latest api/openapi.yaml
Make check target exits non-zero on validator errors.
TS-03-E1 and TS-03-75 are validated by the make check integration.

subtasks.title: Write test: bearerAuth security scheme and public endpoint classification
details: Add TestOpenAPISecurityScheme: assert components.securitySchemes.bearerAuth exists with type=http, scheme=bearer, description mentioning admin/API Key/PAT.
Add TestOpenAPIAuthenticatedEndpoints: enumerate all operations outside public paths; assert each has bearerAuth in security array.
Add TestOpenAPIPublicEndpoints: for /healthz, /readyz, /version, GET /auth/providers assert security is empty/absent and 401 not in responses.

subtasks.title: Write test: PAT permission pattern constraint and built-in permission documentation
details: Add TestOpenAPIPATPermissions: for PatMetadata and Pat schemas, inspect permissions array items schema.
Assert pattern == '^[a-z_]+:[a-z_]+$' and no enum property.
Assert description contains all six built-in strings: users:read, orgs:read, keys:read, keys:manage, tokens:read, tokens:manage.

subtasks.title: Write test: expires field enum and expires_at nullability
details: Add TestOpenAPIExpiresField: for POST /auth/callback and POST /user/tokens, inspect expires property schema; assert enum=[0,30,60,90], default=90, description mentions 0=permanent/null.
Add TestOpenAPIExpiresAtNullable: for ApiKeyMetadata, ApiKey, PatMetadata, Pat schemas; assert expires_at is nullable (type includes null or nullable:true) with format=date-time.

checks: go test ./api/... -count=1 -v passes (TestOpenAPISpec, TestOpenAPIServers, TestOpenAPIRefResolution, TestOpenAPISecurityScheme, TestOpenAPIAuthenticatedEndpoints, TestOpenAPIPublicEndpoints, TestOpenAPIPATPermissions, TestOpenAPIExpiresField, TestOpenAPIExpiresAtNullable all pass)
go vet ./... reports no issues in api/
make check target exists in Makefile and runs openapi-validator — currently may fail if api/openapi.yaml does not yet exist (acceptable at this stage)
Requirements 03-REQ-1.1, 03-REQ-1.2, 03-REQ-1.3, 03-REQ-1.4, 03-REQ-2.1, 03-REQ-2.2, 03-REQ-2.3, 03-REQ-3.1, 03-REQ-3.2, 03-REQ-4.1, 03-REQ-4.2 test harness is in place

task_groups.title: Write tests for PATCH immutability, health probes, OAuth, and user self-service endpoints (part 1)

subtasks.title: Write test: PATCH /user and PATCH /users/{id} request body immutability
details: Add TestOpenAPIPatchUserBody: parse PATCH /user request body schema; assert exactly one property 'full_name'; assert 'username' and 'email' absent.
Add TestOpenAPIPatchUsersIdBody: same assertion for PATCH /users/{id}.
Add TestOpenAPIPatchDescriptions: assert both PATCH operation descriptions contain 'immutable' or similar wording about username/email.
Property test TS-03-P5: enumerate all PATCH operations and run immutability assertion on each.

subtasks.title: Write test: GET /healthz, GET /readyz, GET /version endpoint structure
details: Add TestOpenAPIHealthz: assert path-level servers url='/', no security, 200 body has status field, Cache-Control header defined, X-Request-ID header defined.
Add TestOpenAPIReadyz: same plus 503 response with status=unavailable; both responses have X-Request-ID.
Add TestOpenAPIVersion: assert 200 response body has version, build_time, commit, mount_point fields all typed as string.
Property test TS-03-P7: enumerate /healthz, /readyz, /version path items and assert servers[0].URL == '/'.

subtasks.title: Write test: GET /auth/providers and POST /auth/callback OAuth endpoints
details: Add TestOpenAPIAuthProviders: assert GET /auth/providers has no security, no 401, 200 returns array of OAuthProvider objects with name+authorize_url, Cache-Control header references 'public,max-age=300'.

Add TestOpenAPIAuthCallback: assert POST /auth/callback requires provider/code/redirect_uri; expires is optional integer enum [0,30,60,90] default 90; 200 references AuthCallbackResponse; 400 defined with Error schema; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID on all responses.

subtasks.title: Write test: GET /user and PATCH /user self-service endpoints
details: Add TestOpenAPIGetUser: assert bearerAuth in security; 200 has User response and ETag header; 304 has X-Request-ID+ETag headers and no content, no Cache-Control on 304; 401 and 403 defined; Cache-Control:no-store on 200.
Add TestOpenAPIPatchUser: assert bearerAuth; request body has only full_name; 200, 400, 401, 403, 415 defined; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID on all responses.
Smoke test TS-03-SMOKE-3 covered via TestOpenAPIGetUser ETag/304 assertions.

subtasks.title: Write test: GET /user/keys, POST /user/keys/{key_id}/refresh, DELETE /user/keys/{key_id}
details: Add TestOpenAPIGetUserKeys: assert bearerAuth; 200 returns array of ApiKeyMetadata with nullable expires_at/revoked_at; 401, 403 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIRefreshKey: assert bearerAuth; 200 returns ApiKey schema with key/key_id/nullable expires_at; 401, 403, 404 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIDeleteUserKey: assert bearerAuth; 204 has no content; 401, 403, 404 defined.

subtasks.title: Write test: GET /user/tokens, POST /user/tokens, GET /user/tokens/{token_id}, DELETE /user/tokens/{token_id}, GET /user/orgs
details: Add TestOpenAPIGetUserTokens: assert bearerAuth; 200 is array of PatMetadata; 401, 403 defined.
Add TestOpenAPICreateToken: assert bearerAuth; requires name+permissions; permissions items use pattern; expires optional enum; 201 returns Pat with token field; 400, 401, 403, 415 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIGetUserToken: assert bearerAuth; 200 has ETag; 304 has X-Request-ID+ETag no content; 401, 403, 404 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIDeleteUserToken: assert bearerAuth; 204 no content; 401, 403, 404 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIGetUserOrgs: assert bearerAuth; description mentions orgs:read; 200 is array of Organization; 401, 403 defined.

checks: go test ./api/... -count=1 -v passes all new tests in this group (may be skipped/xfailed if spec file not yet present)
go vet ./... reports no issues
Requirements 03-REQ-5.1 through 03-REQ-8.10 test harness is in place
No test asserts on ETag derivation algorithm or individual operation-level semantics beyond structural schema presence

task_groups.title: Write tests for admin user endpoints, org endpoints, schemas, errors, caching, and operational headers

subtasks.title: Write test: admin user management endpoints (POST/GET /users, GET/PATCH /users/{id}, promote/demote/block/unblock)
details: Add TestOpenAPIPostUsers: requires username/email/provider/provider_id; 201 User; 400,401,403,409,415 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIGetUsers: include_blocked boolean param default false; 200 User array; 401,403 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIGetUserById: ETag on 200; 304 with X-Request-ID+ETag no content; 401,403,404 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIPatchUsersById: only full_name in body; 200,401,403,404,415 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIPromoteDemoteBlockUnblock: each returns 200 User; demote has 409 for last-admin; all have 401,403,404.

subtasks.title: Write test: admin user key/token management endpoints and org CRUD
details: Add TestOpenAPIAdminUserKeys: GET /users/{id}/keys returns ApiKeyMetadata array; DELETE /users/{id}/keys/{key_id} returns 204; both have 401,403,404.
Add TestOpenAPIAdminUserTokens: GET /users/{id}/tokens returns PatMetadata array; DELETE /users/{id}/tokens/{token_id} returns 204; both have 401,403,404.
Add TestOpenAPIPostOrgs: requires name+slug; url optional; 201 Organization; 409 defined; 400,401,403,415 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIGetOrgs: include_blocked boolean param default false; 200 Organization array; 401,403 defined.

subtasks.title: Write test: GET/PATCH/DELETE /orgs/{id} and org block/unblock/members endpoints
details: Add TestOpenAPIGetOrgById: dual-role auth note in description; ETag on 200; 304 with X-Request-ID+ETag no content; 401,403,404 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIPatchOrg: name+url optional (not in required); 200,401,403,404,409,415 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIDeleteOrg: 204 no content; cascade noted in description; 401,403,404 defined.
Add TestOpenAPIBlockUnblockOrg: block returns 200 Organization; unblock returns 200 Organization; both 401,403,404.
Add TestOpenAPIOrgMembers: GET /orgs/{id}/members has orgs:read in description, 200 User array; PUT /orgs/{id}/members/{user_id} no requestBody, 204; DELETE /orgs/{id}/members/{user_id} 204.

subtasks.title: Write test: components/schemas definitions (User, ApiKeyMetadata, ApiKey, PatMetadata, Pat, Organization, OAuthProvider, Error, AuthCallbackResponse)
details: Add TestOpenAPIUserSchema: all fields present; full_name nullable; status enum active/blocked; role enum admin/user; id has format uuid.
Add TestOpenAPIKeySchemas: ApiKeyMetadata has key_id/created_at/nullable expires_at/nullable revoked_at; ApiKey has key/key_id/nullable expires_at.
Add TestOpenAPIPATSchemas: PatMetadata has all fields + pattern-constrained permissions; Pat has token/token_id/name/permissions/nullable expires_at.
Add TestOpenAPIOrgSchema: id/name/slug/nullable url/status enum/created_at/updated_at.
Add TestOpenAPIErrorSchema: error object with integer code and string message; description states code=HTTP status, no sub-codes.
Add TestOpenAPIAuthCallbackResponseSchema: user $ref to User; api_key with key/key_id/nullable expires_at.

subtasks.title: Write test: error response coverage, caching headers, and timestamp format
details: Add TestOpenAPIErrorCoverage: enumerate operations; assert each has applicable error codes referencing Error schema.
Add TestOpenAPIAuthErrors (property test TS-03-P2): all bearerAuth operations have 401+403 with Error schema.
Add TestOpenAPI413Coverage: all operations with requestBody have 413 with Error schema.
Add TestOpenAPICachingHeaders: mutable resource ops have Cache-Control:no-store; health probes have no-cache; GET /auth/providers has public,max-age=300.
Add TestOpenAPITimestampFormat: all timestamp fields in all schemas use format=date-time.

subtasks.title: Write test: X-Request-ID on all responses, ETag as opaque string, Content-Type constraints, and 304 conditional response completeness
details: Add TestOpenAPIXRequestIDEverywhere (property test TS-03-P3): enumerate every (operation, statusCode, response); assert X-Request-ID header defined as string.

Add TestOpenAPIETagOpaque (property test TS-03-P1): for GET /user, GET /users/{id}, GET /user/tokens/{token_id}, GET /orgs/{id}; assert ETag on 200 has type=string, no format, no pattern, no derivation in description.
Add TestOpenAPIContentTypeConstraints: all requestBody use application/json; 204+304 have no content.
Add TestOpenAPI304Responses (property test TS-03-P9): four conditional GETs have 304 with X-Request-ID+ETag, no content, no Cache-Control on 304.

checks: go test ./api/... -count=1 -v passes all tests in this group
go vet ./... reports no issues
Requirements 03-REQ-9.1 through 03-REQ-15.1 test harness is in place
Property tests TS-03-P1 through TS-03-P9 are all implemented as Go test functions
Edge case tests TS-03-E1, TS-03-E2, TS-03-E3 have test scaffolding in place

task_groups.title: Author api/openapi.yaml — top-level structure, servers, schemas, and security

subtasks.title: Create api/openapi.yaml with openapi version, info, and servers block
details: Create api/openapi.yaml with openapi: '3.1.0', info block (title: apikit API, version: 0.1.0).
Add top-level servers: [{url: /api/v1, description: 'Default mount point (configurable per deployment)'}].
Validate YAML syntax before committing.

subtasks.title: Define components/schemas: User, OAuthProvider, Error, AuthCallbackResponse
details: Define User schema: id (string, format:uuid), username, email, full_name (nullable string), status (enum: active, blocked), role (enum: admin, user), provider, provider_id, created_at (string, format:date-time), updated_at (string, format:date-time). All required except full_name nullable.
Define OAuthProvider schema: name (string), authorize_url (string).
Define Error schema: required error object with code (integer, description: equals HTTP status code exactly, no sub-codes) and message (string).
Define AuthCallbackResponse schema: user ($ref: '#/components/schemas/User'), api_key (object with key string, key_id string, expires_at nullable date-time string).
All timestamps use type: string, format: date-time with description noting RFC 3339 UTC Z suffix.

subtasks.title: Define components/schemas: ApiKeyMetadata, ApiKey, PatMetadata, Pat, Organization
details: Define ApiKeyMetadata: key_id (string), created_at (date-time), expires_at (nullable date-time), revoked_at (nullable date-time).
Define ApiKey: key (string, description: full key string including plaintext secret), key_id (string), expires_at (nullable date-time).

Define PatMetadata: token_id, name, permissions (array, items: {type: string, pattern: '^[a-z_]+:[a-z_]+$', description listing all 6 built-in permissions}), created_at, expires_at (nullable), revoked_at (nullable).
Define Pat: token (string, description: full token including plaintext secret, returned only at creation), token_id, name, permissions (same pattern array), expires_at (nullable).
Define Organization: id (uuid), name, slug, url (nullable string), status (enum: active, blocked), created_at, updated_at.
Use OpenAPI 3.1 null representation (type: [string, 'null'] or nullable: true depending on tooling compatibility).

subtasks.title: Define components/securitySchemes (bearerAuth) and reusable header/response components
details: Define components/securitySchemes/bearerAuth: type: http, scheme: bearer, description covering all three credential formats (Admin Token: <prefix>_admin_<64 hex>, API Key: <prefix>_<key_id>_<secret>, PAT: <prefix>_pat_<token_id>_<secret>).
Define reusable components/headers/XRequestID: schema type: string, description: UUID present on every response for tracing.
Define reusable components/headers/ETag: schema type: string (no format, no pattern), description: Opaque string; derivation is an implementation detail of server_core.
Define reusable components/responses for common error codes (400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 413, 415, 500) each with Error schema and X-Request-ID header.

subtasks.title: Define components/parameters and reusable request/response schemas for expires field
details: Define reusable ExpiresParam schema: type: integer, enum: [0, 30, 60, 90], default: 90, description: Expiry in days. 0 = no expiry (permanent); expires_at will be null. 30/60/90 = expiry 24h×N from creation.

Define reusable IncludeBlockedParam: in: query, name: include_blocked, schema: {type: boolean, default: false}, description: When false (default), only status=active resources returned. When true, status=blocked resources included.
Reference these from POST /auth/callback, POST /user/tokens, GET /users, GET /orgs.

checks: go test ./api/... -count=1 -v — TestOpenAPISpec, TestOpenAPIServers, component schema tests pass
go vet ./... reports no issues
make check (openapi-validator) exits 0 with the partial spec (schemas + security defined, paths may be partially populated)
Requirements 03-REQ-2.1, 03-REQ-3.1, 03-REQ-3.2, 03-REQ-4.1, 03-REQ-4.2, 03-REQ-11.1–03-REQ-11.9 acceptance criteria met for defined schemas

task_groups.title: Author health probe, OAuth, and authenticated user self-service path definitions

subtasks.title: Define health probe paths: /healthz, /readyz, /version
details: For /healthz: path-level servers: [{url: /}]; GET op with no security; 200 body {status: string, enum: [ok]}; Cache-Control: no-cache header; X-Request-ID header; no 401/403.
For /readyz: same servers override; 200 body {status: ok}; 503 body {status: unavailable}; Cache-Control: no-cache; X-Request-ID on both responses.
For /version: path-level servers override; 200 body object with version, build_time, commit, mount_point (all strings); Cache-Control: no-cache; X-Request-ID.
None of the three paths have 500 response required (infrastructure returns it but not documented per PRD scope).

subtasks.title: Define OAuth paths: /auth/providers and /auth/callback
details: GET /auth/providers: no security; 200 array of $ref OAuthProvider; Cache-Control: public, max-age=300 header; X-Request-ID header; no 401 defined.

POST /auth/callback: no security; requestBody required: provider (string), code (string), redirect_uri (string); expires: $ref ExpiresParam (optional); 200 $ref AuthCallbackResponse; 400 $ref Error response; 413 response; Cache-Control: no-store; X-Request-ID on all responses.

subtasks.title: Define GET /user and PATCH /user
details: GET /user: security: [bearerAuth]; 200 $ref User + ETag header + Cache-Control:no-store + X-Request-ID; 304 response with X-Request-ID+ETag headers, no content, no Cache-Control; 401, 403, 500 responses; description mentions If-None-Match conditional support and users:read PAT permission.

PATCH /user: security: [bearerAuth]; requestBody application/json with schema: {type: object, required: [full_name], properties: {full_name: {type: string}}}; description states username and email are immutable via PATCH; 200 $ref User; 400, 401, 403, 415, 413, 500 responses; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

subtasks.title: Define GET/POST/DELETE /user/keys paths and GET/DELETE /user/tokens paths
details: GET /user/keys: bearerAuth; 200 array $ref ApiKeyMetadata; 401, 403, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID; description: requires keys:read PAT.
POST /user/keys/{key_id}/refresh: bearerAuth; no body; 200 $ref ApiKey; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID; description: requires keys:manage PAT.
DELETE /user/keys/{key_id}: bearerAuth; 204 no content + X-Request-ID; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; description: requires keys:manage PAT.
GET /user/tokens: bearerAuth; 200 array $ref PatMetadata; 401, 403, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID; description: requires tokens:read PAT.
DELETE /user/tokens/{token_id}: bearerAuth; 204 + X-Request-ID; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; description: requires tokens:manage PAT.

subtasks.title: Define POST /user/tokens, GET /user/tokens/{token_id}, and GET /user/orgs
details: POST /user/tokens: bearerAuth; requestBody required name (string) + permissions (array pattern items); optional expires $ref ExpiresParam; 201 $ref Pat; 400, 401, 403, 413, 415, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID; description: requires tokens:manage PAT.

GET /user/tokens/{token_id}: bearerAuth; 200 $ref PatMetadata + ETag header; 304 with X-Request-ID+ETag no content no Cache-Control; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store on 200; description: requires tokens:read PAT + If-None-Match support.
GET /user/orgs: bearerAuth; 200 array $ref Organization; 401, 403, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID; description: requires orgs:read PAT.

checks: go test ./api/... -count=1 -v — all tests for groups 1 and 2 (health probe, OAuth, self-service user endpoints) pass
make check (openapi-validator) exits 0 with all paths defined so far
go vet ./... reports no issues
Requirements 03-REQ-1.3, 03-REQ-6.1–6.3, 03-REQ-7.1–7.2, 03-REQ-8.1–8.10 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Author admin user management path definitions

subtasks.title: Define POST /users and GET /users (admin endpoints)
details: POST /users: bearerAuth; requestBody required username, email, provider, provider_id (all strings); 201 $ref User; 400, 401, 403, 409 (duplicate username or provider/provider_id), 413, 415, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

GET /users: bearerAuth; query param include_blocked ($ref IncludeBlockedParam); 200 array $ref User; 401, 403, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID; description: include_blocked=false returns only status=active users; include_blocked=true includes status=blocked.

subtasks.title: Define GET /users/{id} and PATCH /users/{id} (admin endpoints)
details: GET /users/{id}: bearerAuth; 200 $ref User + ETag header; 304 X-Request-ID+ETag no content no Cache-Control; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store on 200; X-Request-ID.

PATCH /users/{id}: bearerAuth; requestBody schema with only full_name (string, required); description: username and email are immutable via PATCH; 200 $ref User; 401, 403, 404, 413, 415, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

subtasks.title: Define POST /users/{id}/promote and POST /users/{id}/demote
details: POST /users/{id}/promote: bearerAuth; no body; 200 $ref User (description: user.role=admin); 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.
POST /users/{id}/demote: bearerAuth; no body; 200 $ref User (description: user.role=user); 401, 403, 404, 409 (cannot demote last admin), 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

subtasks.title: Define POST /users/{id}/block, POST /users/{id}/unblock
details: POST /users/{id}/block: bearerAuth; no body; 200 $ref User (description: user.status=blocked); 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.
POST /users/{id}/unblock: bearerAuth; no body; 200 $ref User (description: user.status=active); 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

subtasks.title: Define GET /users/{id}/keys, DELETE /users/{id}/keys/{key_id}, GET /users/{id}/tokens, DELETE /users/{id}/tokens/{token_id}
details: GET /users/{id}/keys: bearerAuth; 200 array $ref ApiKeyMetadata; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.
DELETE /users/{id}/keys/{key_id}: bearerAuth; 204 + X-Request-ID; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store.
GET /users/{id}/tokens: bearerAuth; 200 array $ref PatMetadata; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.
DELETE /users/{id}/tokens/{token_id}: bearerAuth; 204 + X-Request-ID; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store.

checks: go test ./api/... -count=1 -v — all admin user endpoint tests (group 3 subset) pass
make check exits 0 with all admin user paths defined
go vet ./... reports no issues
Requirements 03-REQ-9.1 through 03-REQ-9.12 acceptance criteria met

subtasks.title: Define POST /orgs and GET /orgs
details: POST /orgs: bearerAuth; requestBody required name (string), slug (string); optional url (string); 201 $ref Organization; 400, 401, 403, 409 (duplicate name or slug), 413, 415, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

GET /orgs: bearerAuth; query param include_blocked ($ref IncludeBlockedParam); 200 array $ref Organization; 401, 403, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID; description: include_blocked filtering behavior matches GET /users.

subtasks.title: Define GET /orgs/{id} and PATCH /orgs/{id}
details: GET /orgs/{id}: bearerAuth; description: accepts admin credentials or member with orgs:read PAT permission; 200 $ref Organization + ETag header; 304 X-Request-ID+ETag no content no Cache-Control; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store on 200.

PATCH /orgs/{id}: bearerAuth; requestBody optional name (string), url (string) — neither in required array; 200 $ref Organization; 401, 403, 404, 409 (duplicate name), 413, 415, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

subtasks.title: Define DELETE /orgs/{id}, POST /orgs/{id}/block, POST /orgs/{id}/unblock
details: DELETE /orgs/{id}: bearerAuth; 204 + X-Request-ID; description: cascades membership deletions; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store.
POST /orgs/{id}/block: bearerAuth; 200 $ref Organization (description: status=blocked); 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.
POST /orgs/{id}/unblock: bearerAuth; 200 $ref Organization (description: status=active); 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.

subtasks.title: Define GET /orgs/{id}/members, PUT /orgs/{id}/members/{user_id}, DELETE /orgs/{id}/members/{user_id}
details: GET /orgs/{id}/members: bearerAuth; description: accepts admin or member with orgs:read PAT; 200 array $ref User; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; X-Request-ID.
PUT /orgs/{id}/members/{user_id}: bearerAuth; NO requestBody defined; 204 + X-Request-ID; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store; description: user ID conveyed via path parameter only.
DELETE /orgs/{id}/members/{user_id}: bearerAuth; 204 + X-Request-ID; 401, 403, 404, 500; Cache-Control:no-store.

checks: go test ./api/... -count=1 -v — all organization endpoint tests pass
make check exits 0 with complete spec (all paths defined)
go vet ./... reports no issues
Requirements 03-REQ-10.1 through 03-REQ-10.10 acceptance criteria met
PUT /orgs/{id}/members/{user_id} has no requestBody defined (TS-03-50 passes)

task_groups.title: Full spec validation checkpoint — all paths, schemas, and headers complete

subtasks.title: Run full test suite and openapi-validator against complete api/openapi.yaml
details: Run go test ./api/... -count=1 -v; confirm all tests pass.
Run make check; confirm openapi-validator exits 0.
Confirm no unresolved $ref errors reported.
Confirm all 17 requirements have at least one passing test.

subtasks.title: Audit X-Request-ID presence on all response codes across all operations
details: Run TestOpenAPIXRequestIDEverywhere property test; confirm zero failures.
Manually spot-check 204, 304, and 5xx responses on at least three operations.
Fix any missing X-Request-ID header definitions in api/openapi.yaml.

subtasks.title: Audit 401+403 completeness on all authenticated endpoints
details: Run TestOpenAPIAuthErrors property test; confirm zero failures.
Manually verify that every operation with bearerAuth security has both 401 and 403 with the Error schema.
Fix any gaps in api/openapi.yaml.

subtasks.title: Audit 413 presence on all request-body endpoints
details: Run TestOpenAPI413Coverage; confirm zero failures.
Enumerate all operations with requestBody defined; confirm 413 response with Error schema present on each.
Fix any missing 413 responses in api/openapi.yaml.

subtasks.title: Audit PATCH body immutability, ETag opaqueness, and 304 response completeness
details: Run TestOpenAPIPatchImmutability (TS-03-P5): confirm PATCH /user and PATCH /users/{id} have exactly {full_name} in request body schema.
Run TestOpenAPIETagOpaque (TS-03-P1): confirm ETag schemas on 4 endpoints have type=string, no format/pattern/derivation description.
Run TestOpenAPI304Responses (TS-03-P9): confirm 304 responses on 4 conditional GET endpoints have X-Request-ID+ETag headers, no content, no Cache-Control.

checks: go test ./... -count=1 exits 0 — entire test suite green

task_groups.title: End-to-end wiring verification — spec, validation harness, and tooling integration

subtasks.title: Trace execution paths: go test ./... discovers and executes api/api_test.go
details: Run go test ./... from repository root; confirm api package appears in output with PASS.
Confirm TestOpenAPISpec calls os.ReadFile → libopenapi.NewDocument → BuildV3Model → asserts len(errs)==0.
Confirm no panic/os.Exit usage in api/api_test.go — only t.Fatalf on errors (03-PATH-1).
Confirm no stubs remain: search api/api_test.go for 'panic("not implemented")', '// TODO', bare 'return nil' in non-trivial paths.

subtasks.title: Trace execution path: make check invokes openapi-validator and propagates exit code
details: Run make check with valid spec; confirm exit code 0.
Temporarily introduce a bad $ref; run make check; confirm non-zero exit and validator error in output.
Restore spec to valid state; confirm make check returns 0.
Confirm Makefile check target uses the exact validator command from the PRD tech stack.

subtasks.title: Run smoke tests: POST /auth/callback, conditional GET, PAT creation, admin lifecycle, org filtering
details: TS-03-SMOKE-2: validate POST /auth/callback operation definition — required fields, expires enum, AuthCallbackResponse, Cache-Control:no-store.
TS-03-SMOKE-3: validate GET /user ETag/304 conditional support — ETag on 200, 304 with X-Request-ID+ETag no body no Cache-Control.
TS-03-SMOKE-4: validate admin user lifecycle endpoints — POST /users 409, promote, demote 409.
TS-03-SMOKE-5: validate POST /user/tokens and GET /user/orgs — pattern permissions, Pat schema with token, orgs:read documented.
TS-03-SMOKE-6: validate GET /orgs include_blocked parameter behavior documented.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation in api/api_test.go error handling
details: Confirm file-read error path: temporarily remove api/openapi.yaml; run go test ./api/... and confirm non-zero exit with FAIL message (not panic). Restore file.
Confirm parser error path: temporarily corrupt api/openapi.yaml with invalid YAML; run go test ./api/... and confirm t.Fatalf fires with error details. Restore file.
Confirm all error return values from NewDocument and BuildV3Model are checked — no discarded errors.
Search for any unchecked error returns (e.g. '_' assignment) in api/api_test.go.

subtasks.title: Stub and dead-code audit across all spec artifacts
details: Search api/ directory for Go stub markers: grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' api/; grep -rn '// TODO' api/; grep -rn 'panic(' api/.
Confirm api/openapi.yaml has no placeholder values (e.g. 'TODO', 'FIXME', '<placeholder>') in any field.
Confirm all $ref targets in api/openapi.yaml resolve (make check passes with 0 errors).
Confirm no operation is missing its summary or description field.
No cross-spec entry points to verify — this spec has no upstream dependencies (spec is self-contained).
